name: Greene Ridge Racquet Club
description: Greene Ridge Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Snow Hill, NC. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, trainers or lessons, and water. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Open 8:00 am until dark. We use Group Me to schedule Open Play.
fees:
Members only — $34 a month for single membership or $44 for family 

$10 for guest fee - show up, call, or email to play

rltaylor10s@gmail.com
